top_signals.title: Southampton fails in bid to overturn expulsion from world’s richest match
top_signals.summary: Southampton was thrown out of the final on Tuesday, and handed a four-point deduction for next season, after ​it had beaten semifinal opponent Middlesbrough.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
